languages.text: "Кибелла подала хорошую идею. Кардинал подвернется сакральному истязанию по заветам Кровавой паутины. Ожидаю, что Его Преосвященство в процессе пересмотрит свои взгляды на смерть".
languages.translation_comment:
Запускается этюд VP_CardinalDeathCult
Дать Даргонусу дов+
Оставляем кардинала в живых — он уходит на свою личную "казнь"
Весы направо

Запускается этюд VP_CardinalDeathCult
Дать Даргонусу дов+
Оставляем кардинала в живых — он уходит на свою личную "казнь"
Весы направо

languages.text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."
languages.original_text: "Кибелла подала хорошую идею. Кардинал подвернется сакральному истязанию по заветам Кровавой паутины. Ожидаю, что Его Преосвященство в процессе пересмотрит свои взгляды на смерть".

traits.locale_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo a sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Holiness to reassess his views on death in the process."

"Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo a sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Holiness to reassess his views on death in the process."

"Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

"Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

languages.text: "Kibellah hat einen guten Vorschlag gemacht. Der Kardinal wird sich einer heiligen Folter im Sinne des Blutgesponnenen Netzes unterziehen. Danach dürfte Seine Eminenz etwas anders über den Tod denken."
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

traits.locale_text: "Kibellah hat einen guten Vorschlag gemacht. Der Kardinal wird sich einer heiligen Folter im Sinne des Blutgesponnenen Netzes unterziehen. Danach dürfte Seine Eminenz etwas anders über den Tod denken."

languages.text: « Je m'en remets à l'avis éclairé de Kibellah. Le cardinal sera soumis à la torture sacrée telle que pratiquée au sein de la Toile de Sang. J'ose espérer que Son Éminence sera ainsi amenée à reconsidérer son opinion sur la mort. »
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

traits.locale_text: « Je m'en remets à l'avis éclairé de Kibellah. Le cardinal sera soumis à la torture sacrée telle que pratiquée au sein de la Toile de Sang. J'ose espérer que Son Éminence sera ainsi amenée à reconsidérer son opinion sur la mort. »

languages.text: “绮贝菈的建议很中肯。红衣主教将会以织血罗网的方式接受神圣的痛苦。我希望，这个过程能帮助主教大人重新认清看待死亡的方式。”
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

traits.locale_text: “绮贝菈的建议很中肯。红衣主教将会以织血罗网的方式接受神圣的痛苦。我希望，这个过程能帮助主教大人重新认清看待死亡的方式。”

languages.text: «Kibellah ha hecho una buena sugerencia. El cardenal se someterá a tortura sagrada con el método establecido por la Red Sanguinolenta. Confío en que Su Eminencia reconsidere su opinión sobre la muerte en el proceso».
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

traits.locale_text: «Kibellah ha hecho una buena sugerencia. El cardenal se someterá a tortura sagrada con el método establecido por la Red Sanguinolenta. Confío en que Su Eminencia reconsidere su opinión sobre la muerte en el proceso».

languages.text: 「キベラは良い提案をした。枢機卿にはブラッドスパン・ウェブの定められた方式に従って聖なる拷問を受けてもらおう。その過程で、猊下も死に対する見解を見直すことになるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."

traits.locale_text: 「キベラは良い提案をした。枢機卿にはブラッドスパン・ウェブの定められた方式に従って聖なる拷問を受けてもらおう。その過程で、猊下も死に対する見解を見直すことになるだろう」

languages.text: "Kibellah'dan güzel bir öneri geldi. Kardinal, Kanipi Ağı usulünce kutsal işkenceye tabi tutulacak. Bu vesileyle Sayın Kardinal'in ölüme dair görüşlerini de değiştireceği kanaatindeyim."
languages.original_text: "Kibellah has made a good suggestion. The cardinal shall undergo sacred torture in the established fashion of the Bloodspun Web. I expect His Eminence will reconsider his views on death in the process."
